combinedInsights.message: Build-up actions are unstable and reduce controlled progression.
combinedInsights.recommendation: Train press-resistant passing triangles with one-touch escape patterns.

combinedInsights.message: Ball retention risk is high and creates transition exposure.
combinedInsights.recommendation: Add constrained rondo and own-half exit drills under directional pressure.

combinedInsights.message: Pressing effectiveness is below tactical target.
combinedInsights.recommendation: Drill coordinated counterpressing with first-5-second recovery targets.
Use shot selection circuits with pre-shot scan constraints.

combinedInsights.message: Progression quality is inconsistent and limits vertical threat.
combinedInsights.recommendation: Run third-man progression patterns with carry-vs-pass decision triggers.

playerPriorities.recommendedAction: Review final-third pass/shot selection in constrained scenarios.

trainingFocus.drill: 6v4 build-up under press with mandatory support angles

trainingFocus.objective: Reduce dangerous turnovers in own half
trainingFocus.drill: Directional rondo with immediate transition punishment
Counterpressing wave drill with compactness scoring

frontendOutput.headline: Build-up instability is the main tactical risk

topProblems.message: Build-up actions are unstable and reduce controlled progression.
Ball retention risk is high and creates transition exposure.
Pressing effectiveness is below tactical target.

recommendations: Train press-resistant passing triangles with one-touch escape patterns.
Add constrained rondo and own-half exit drills under directional pressure.
Drill coordinated counterpressing with first-5-second recovery targets.

pressing.insight: Pressing was largely ineffective, pressing improved in the second half.
